# serifFontFamily

**Instance Property**

The serif font family of the web view.

## Declaration

```swift
var serifFontFamily: String! { get set }
```

## Discussion

This preference affects text whose properties indicate that it should be displayed in a serif font but do not specify a particular font.

## Getting and Setting Fonts

- **cursiveFontFamily**: The cursive font family of the web view.
- **fantasyFontFamily**: The fantasy font family of the web view.
- **fixedFontFamily**: The fixed font family of the web view.
- **sansSerifFontFamily**: The sans serif font family of the web view.
- **standardFontFamily**: The standard font family of the web view.
